validate.notes: Cannot run validation: Bash tool is broken in this environment with EACCES error trying to mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env. Every Bash call fails before executing any command. Tried disabling sandbox and delegating to a subagent — same failure. Cannot run docker build, NOP test, gold test, or rubric judge without bash. The previous validate node (preserved in 'validate_prior') reported pass with nop=0/gold=1 after fix_quality completed. The fix_quality node (claude-opus-4-7) ran for 383.95s and likely modified files; without bash I cannot confirm those edits did not break validation. Environment-level fix needed: chown/create /home/worker/.claude/session-env so the harness can initialize the bash tool.

validate_prior.notes: Prior validate run (before fix_quality modified files). All four checks passed: 1) Docker build successful, 2) NOP test reward=0 (9 f2p tests correctly fail on base code), 3) Gold test reward=1 (all 22 tests pass after fix), 4) Rubric judge ICR=1.00 (2/2 rules passed).
